iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_cc_binary(
  NAME
    hrx-info
  SRCS
    "hrx_info.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    libhrx::src::libhrx::hrx
    libhrx_defs
)

set_target_properties(libhrx_tools_hrx-info PROPERTIES

)
